## Summary

(1–3 sentences. What changed and why.)

## Type of change

- [ ] feat: new functionality
- [ ] fix: bug fix
- [ ] chore: maintenance / refactor / deps
- [ ] docs: documentation only

## Test plan

- [ ] CI green on `ubuntu-latest` and `windows-latest`
- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] Manual smoke if GUI / behaviour change

## Standards

- [ ] Follows REPO_STRUCTURE, MODULE_SEPARATION, LANGUAGE
- [ ] No banned APIs introduced (`BannedSymbols.txt` clean)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
